meaning: adj.外部的,客观的,[医]外用的,外国的,表面的n.外部,外面
examples: An external auditor will verify the accounts.
Many external influences can affect your state of mind.
College lecturers acted as external assessors of the exam results.
The IMF is applying an external bandage to patients who have massive internal injuries.
More importantly, the country is much less vulnerable to external shocks than it used to be.
